items.headline: Ofgem publishes "minded-to" (provisional) decisions for LDES Cap & Floor Window 1
items.summary: Ofgem's provisional Window 1 cap & floor decisions for UK long-duration storage, opened for consultation to Aug 7, 2026 before final binding awards. "Minded-to" = proposed, not yet awarded. Frontier Power Ltd. (UK) entered Window 1 with ~16 Eos-zinc / Invinity-flow projects (~2.6 GW / 20 GWh); their status on the provisional list should be confirmed against Ofgem's project tables.

items.headline: Frontier Power USA Engages KKR Capital Markets to Support Scaled Deployment of Long-Duration Energy Storage
items.summary: FPUSA engaged KKR Capital Markets as structuring agent for construction finance, tax equity and long-term project finance across its 2 GWh pipeline — de-risking FPUSA's capitalisation alongside Cerberus' $100M equity anchor and the Ariel Green TPI wrap; complements Eos' ~$150M rights-offering contribution.

items.headline: Independent Fire Testing Confirms Eos Z3 Battery System Exhibited No Thermal Runaway, No Sustained Fire, and No Propagation Under Abuse Testing; Company Receives ISO 14001 Certification
items.summary: Energy Safety Response Group testing found no thermal runaway, no sustained fire, and no propagation under direct flame impingement and overcharge abuse, supporting safe siting of long-duration storage in dense urban environments…

items.headline: Eos Energy Enterprises Establishes Strategic Entry into Germany Through Exclusive Long-Duration Storage Partnership
items.summary: Binding Master Supply Agreement secures a 750 MWh capacity commitment with a pathway to scale up to 2 GWh of Indensity™ deployments across Germany, Austria and Switzerland through 2031 First projects under a previously executed purchase…
